instruction: Two subtle issues on the cloud snow icon: the blue header bar is the wrong shade (off-white) AND it has drifted slightly (~3px). Restore it precisely.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cloud-snow.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M20 17.58A5 5 0 0 0 18 8h-1.26A8 8 0 1 0 4 16.25"/><line x1="8" y1="16" x2="8.01" y2="16"/><line x1="8" y1="20" x2="8.01" y2="20"/><line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12.01" y2="18"/><line x1="12" y1="22" x2="12.01" y2="22"/><line x1="16" y1="16" x2="16.01" y2="16"/><line x1="16" y1="20" x2="16.01" y2="20"/></g>
  <rect id="bar" fill="#fafafa" x="13" y="12" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cloud-snow.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M20 17.58A5 5 0 0 0 18 8h-1.26A8 8 0 1 0 4 16.25"/><line x1="8" y1="16" x2="8.01" y2="16"/><line x1="8" y1="20" x2="8.01" y2="20"/><line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12.01" y2="18"/><line x1="12" y1="22" x2="12.01" y2="22"/><line x1="16" y1="16" x2="16.01" y2="16"/><line x1="16" y1="20" x2="16.01" y2="20"/></g>
  <rect id="bar" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="12" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
